analysis_commentary: Training throughput collapse: only 90 steps (vs 538 baseline). 0 arenas. Pattern across last 4 runs: 538→384→120→90 steps. Investigation: ~/Library/Application Support/DrewsChessMachine/Sessions/ is 16.8GB across 7 promote-saves; disk is 99% full (12GB free). Session autosave writes are blocking training. This is a system issue not a parameter issue — change tagged regressed but the cause is environmental. User intervention needed to free disk space.
